title: schefflera heterophylla
intro: Schefflera heterophylla, also known as the umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. Schefflera heterophylla is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
